text:
is the 2nd episode of the 1st season and the 2nd episode overall of the Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi web miniseries, produced by .

Overview

 A bow and arrow specialist, Sasha hunts with the people of her village to survive. However, when the village was attacked by a Titan everyone was driven from their homes. In the wake of the Titan attack, Sasha joins the Scout Regiment as a new recruit and trains her hardest every day. One night she sees a suspicious boy, whose appearance triggers a series of strange incidents.
